div.head: The Ambassador in France (Bullitt) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 1482. Reference Embassy’s 1468 to 1470, October 19, 4 p.m. The Chinese Ambassador states in confidence that he saw DelbosFrench Minister for Foreign Affairs. yesterday regarding the prohibition of transit shipments through Indo-China, and pressed for a reconsideration of the matter by the French Government, stating that it was “a question of life and death for China”. Delbos gave Wellington Koo to understand that he would ask ChautempsPresident of the French Council of Ministers (Premier). to have the matter considered again by the French Ministers dealing with national defense.
